events.title: Grease, Grit and GrimeEarly Bird Blues
events.description: Back in February, Grease, Grit and Grime returned to the Crazy Horse for the first time in many years. It was quite a homecoming for this beloved local band. They have been warmly embraced by blues connoisseurs all over Nevada County for the better part of two decades. GGG refer to their sound as, “Dirty Blues,” but it goes down smooth like a mint julep on a sunny afternoon. When it comes to the sultry, dance-inducing side of the blues equation, you can be sure they have that covered. Harp maest
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: The Pickpockets
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Bluegrass/newgrass/jamgrasss…all of these genres are on fire lately as a number of young bands have electrified the nationwide scene of ever-growing string band lovers. The Pickpockets are one of the latest sensations to stake its claim on the forefront of this progressive movement. Sprouting like a mystical tree directly from the Great Salt Lake of their native Salt Lake City, they draw inspiration from the deepest roots of bluegrass. Embodying the ying/yang of the old and the
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Chris Zanardi & The High Beamz
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS No matter how many times you’ve seen it, the sounds that can be produced by a guitar never cease to be a wondrous marvel. Craftsmanship and wizardry converge in ways that exceed basic logic. Any person with the focus, determination and vision can pick up the instrument and perform what many of us ordinary humans might deem magical feats. Chris Zanardi runs a recording studio in Pollock Pines by day when he’s not out on nature expeditions with his family. By night, he puts on his
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Anna Moss High Sierra Kickoff Ft. Opening Set by Sari Jordan
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS It’s Day Zero of the inaugural High Sierra Music Festival in Grass Valley. Before all the music lovers in the region embark on an adventure they’ll never forget, it’s the great honor of the Crazy Horse Saloon to be the launching point. What you will witness here on this Wednesday night is an encapsulation of the spirit of the festival itself. Love and connectivity transmitted in the form of heartfelt, improvisational music. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Bassline
events.description: BASSLINE is back — deeper, dirtier, and sexier than ever. Join us for a night of cutting-edge underground sounds, featuring the best in bass music, UK garage, 140, and sexy house. Curated and hosted by twin DJs DUST + BEAU, this edition of BASSLINE showcases an all-star lineup of exceptional artists and selectors pushing the boundaries of forward-thinking sound. events.title: Kronosaurus Flex
events.description: Hailing originally from the heartland of Wisconsin, Kronosaurus Flex is as American as a Chevy and apple pie. What better way to celebrate the stars and stripes than with a marathon set drawn from one of the hottest wax collections in the region. A pillar of the local scene since the early days, Kronosaurus has relentlessly evolved over the years. More recently he has earned acclaim as the host of the Cretaceous Space on KVMRX.
